policy: All browser runtime UI assets, MediaPipe modules, WASM files and the hand model are same-origin local assets. The exact official model must be packaged for final release; build-time synchronization is a controlled fallback only.
note: Kurdish UI uses local Noto Kufi Arabic. Smart Shape 2.0, Workspace Navigator, Loading Experience, Performance Guard, exact video-overlay Hand Calibration and GPU-first local hand tracking run locally in the browser.

interfaceIconSystem.method: Semantic CSS mask classes backed by local SVG assets

releaseStatus: v6.1.0 Phase 2 delivers a premium mobile-first settings workspace, explicit dark/light controls, six complete visual skins, stable RTL/LTR controls and text-only FPS, Online and CAM overlays.
